title: Protocol for Exonuclease III (NEB #M0206)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d3gv4","text":"Exonuclease III efficiently degrades nicked and linear dsDNA (with blunt or 5' overhangs) from 3' to 5' direction, leaving supercoiled dsDNA intact.*","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f21is","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cs3cs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dgpd9","text":"*Note: For more precise results or partial digestions, we recommend titration of the enzyme to the intended substrate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"f0s9c","text":"Please see SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Stop reaction by adding EDTA to at least 11 millimolar (mM) .

To clean up treated samples, we recommend using one of the following steps: a. Column clean up (we recommend the Monarch® PCR & DNA Cleanup Kit, NEB #T1030 ), or b. Running the reaction on an agarose gel, and then extracting the DNA (we recommend the Monarch Gel Extraction Kit, NEB #T1020 ), or c. Performing a phenol/chloroform extraction followed by ethanol precipitation.
creator: New England Biolabs Tech Support
